entry.title: KE GONG
entry.content:
Biography

I am currently research director at X-Era AI. I received my Master Degree at Human Cyber Physical Intelligence Integration Lab in Sun Yat-Sen University advised by Prof. Liang Lin.
Email: kegong936 AT gmail.com
Google Scholar

Research Interest

My research focuses on multimodal understanding and generation, as well as embodied artificial intelligence. I study how to unify perception, generation, and action within a single framework, enabling intelligent agents to understand human-centric signals (e.g., vision, speech, and motion) and interact with the physical world. My goal is to develop scalable AI systems that bridge foundation models and real-world deployment.

Academic Services

  • Reviewer for TPAMI, PR, ICLR, CVPR, ICCV, NeurIPS, AAAI, ECCV, WACV, ACCV
entry.summary: Biography
